summary_en: 588,000 shares (1.17% of shares outstanding) up to ¥1,000M via open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange, June 1 – September 30, 2026. Reason: shareholder return enhancement and capital efficiency improvement.
title_en: Notice of determination of matters concerning acquisition of treasury shares (acquisition of treasury shares based on articles of incorporation provisions under Article 165, paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: On 28 May 2026, the board of directors of Vertex Corporation resolved to acquire treasury shares under the Companies Act Article 165(3), read in conjunction with Article 156. The company will acquire up to 588,000 ordinary shares (1.17% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury shares) with an aggregate expenditure limit of ¥1,000 million via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition period runs from 1 June 2026 to 30 September 2026. The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency. As of 31 March 2026, the company held 7,656,240 treasury shares against an issued share capital (excluding treasury) of 50,050,460 shares.
